content.query:
SELECT MAX(EcEventTime)
 FROM [dbo].[ecevents]

WITH EventTimes AS
(
    SELECT
        EcEventTime,
        LAG(EcEventTime) OVER (ORDER BY EcEventTime) AS PrevTime
    FROM dbo.ecevents
    -- WHERE EcEventTime >= '2025-01-01'
)
SELECT
    PrevTime,
    EcEventTime,
    DATEDIFF(DAY, PrevTime, EcEventTime) AS GapDays
FROM EventTimes
WHERE DATEDIFF(HOUR, PrevTime, EcEventTime) > 24
ORDER BY PrevTime;
